channel.title: Pages on ijadux2's website
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on ijadux2's website

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hello, I’m Kumar Vaibhav

I’m a passionate programmer with expertise in system scripting and configuration management. I enjoy building efficient tools and automating workflows.

About Me

  • 💻 Using Neovim as my main editor
    Linux user since - 🐧2020
  • 🔧 Building custom configurations and sharing them

Skills

  • Bash - Shell scripting for automation
  • Lua - Neovim plugin development
  • Python - Versatile programming
  • Linux - System administration
  • Nix - Declarative package management
  • Window Managers - Hyprland, BSPWM, Sway

Projects

Neovim Customizations

Building Neovim with Lazy for a good code editor for Linux
